user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the Survey Module using a Yes/No option, so that I can control whether survey features are available in the system.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the Survey Module?"; Then my selection is recorded

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my Survey Module configuration, so that my enablement choice is persisted.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen a value for the Survey Module toggle; When I click Save; Then the setting is saved and confirmed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the survey setup flow efficiently.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the Survey Module option; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and I advance to the next configuration step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the Setup screen without saving, so that I can discard unintended changes.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then no changes are saved and I exit the screen
